---
title: "Inschriftenschlüssel"
---

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```




## [Opferformel](pages/formeln/opferformel.qmd)

![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/01_Htp-dj-nsw/0010_Htp-dj-nsw_AR-MR_01.png){.glyph} *ḥtp-di-nsw* [Gottheit](pages/slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/02_dj/0001_dj_01.png){.glyph} (*di*) [Gaben](pages/slots/gaben.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gaben} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/01_Opferformel/03_n-kA-n/0001_n-kA-n_01.png){.glyph} *n* / *n kꜣ n* [Person](pages/slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person}   



## [Denkmälerformel](pages/formeln/denkmaelerformel.qmd)

[König](pages/slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} / [Person](pages/slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/02_Denkmaelerformel/01_jrj.n=f-m-mn.w=f/0001_jrj.n=f m mn.w=f_01.png){.glyph} *ir.n⸗f mn.w⸗f* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/02_Denkmaelerformel/02_n-jt=f-mwt=f_01.png){.glyph} *n it / mw.t⸗f* [Gottheit](pages/slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} <b>Tat</b>   



## [Hymnus](pages/formeln/hymnus.qmd)

![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/01_dwA/0001_dwA_01.png){.glyph} *dwꜣ* [Gottheit](pages/slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/02_rDj.t-jAw/0001_rDj.t-jAw_01.png){.glyph} *rdi.t iꜣw* ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/03_sn-tA-n/0001_sn-tA-n_01.png){.glyph} *sn tꜣ n* <span style="vertical-align:-75%">&nbsp;</span><br/> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/04_jn/0001_jn_01.png){.glyph} *in* [Person](pages/slots/person.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-person} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/05_Dd=f/0001_Dd=f_01.png){.glyph} *ḏd⸗f* <span style="vertical-align:-75%">&nbsp;</span><br/> ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/03_Hymnus/06_jnD-Hr/0001_jnD-Hr_01.png){.glyph} *inḏ-ḥr⸗k* / *⸗ṯ* / *⸗ṯn* [Gottheit](pages/slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} <b>Lobpreisungen für Gottheit</b>   



## [König-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel](pages/formeln/koenig-geliebt-von-gottheit-formel.qmd)

[König](pages/slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} [Gottheit](pages/slots/gottheit.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-gottheit} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/04_Koenig-geliebt-von-Gottheit-Formel/01_mry/0001_mry_01.png){.glyph} *mry*   



## [„Historische“ Königsinschrift](pages/formeln/koenigsinschrift.qmd)

[Datum](pages/slots/datum.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-datum} ![](/assets/glyphs500px/01_Textgattung/05_Historische-Koenigsinschrift/01_xr-Hm-n/0001_xr Hm n_01.png){.glyph} *ḫr ḥm n* [König](pages/slots/koenig.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-k-nig} <b>[narrativer Text]</b>   



## [Beischrift](pages/formeln/beischrift.qmd)

Beziehung Szenentitel [Wörtliche Rede](pages/slots/wortlRede.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-w-rtliche-rede} [Rückenschutzformel](pages/slots/rueckenschutzformel.qmd){.badge-slot .badge-r-ckenschutzformel}   



## [Saïten-Formel](pages/formeln/saiten-formel.qmd)




## [Anruf an die Lebenden](pages/formeln/anruf-an-die-lebenden.qmd)
